title: bourreria costaricensis
intro: Bourreria costaricensis, also known as Costarican borretier, is a plant species belonging to the Boraginaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a valuable resource for treating various health issues. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and treating skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Bourreria costaricensis are typically used to make infusions, teas, and topical creams, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
